summary: Tested Edit and Delete functionality on MIS and Loans pages. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Edit/Delete buttons visible for Admin, only Edit visible for Agent (RBAC working). Edit dialog opens with pre-filled loan data on both pages.
passed_tests: PUT /api/loans/{loan_id} - Admin can edit any loan
PUT /api/loans/{loan_id} - Agent can edit own loan
PUT /api/loans/{loan_id} - All loan fields can be updated
DELETE /api/loans/{loan_id} - Admin can delete any loan
MIS page: Edit button (pencil icon) visible for each row
MIS page: Delete button (trash icon) visible only for Admin
MIS page: Edit dialog opens with pre-filled loan data
MIS page: Edit dialog has all fields (Customer Name, Company Name, Contact, Bank, Status, Date, Sanction, Disbursed, etc.)
Loans page: Edit button visible for all users
Loans page: Delete button visible only for Admin
Loans page: Edit dialog opens with pre-filled data
RBAC: Agent sees Edit button but NOT Delete button on MIS page
RBAC: Agent sees Edit button but NOT Delete button on Loans page

mis_page_edit.button_visible: Yes - pencil icon in Actions column
mis_page_edit.dialog_opens: Yes - 'Edit Entry' dialog with all loan fields
mis_page_edit.pre_filled: Yes - Customer Name, Company Name, Contact, Bank, Status, Date, etc.

mis_page_delete.button_visible: Admin only - trash icon in Actions column

context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit and Delete functionality fully tested on both MIS and Loans pages. Backend endpoints PUT /api/loans/{loan_id} and DELETE /api/loans/{loan_id} working correctly. RBAC verified - Delete is admin-only, Edit is available to all authenticated users. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_edit_delete.py covers all scenarios.
